title: Rename chroot/run.go to chroot/run_linux.go
body:
This is a precursor to adding isolation=chroot support for
FreeBSD.

Signed-off-by: Doug Rabson <dfr@rabson.org>


#### What type of PR is this?

/kind cleanup

#### What this PR does / why we need it:

This simply renames chroot/run.go to chroot/run_linux.go to match the naming convention used elsewhere in the codebase.

#### Does this PR introduce a user-facing change?

```release-note
None
```
